nls.ext.description: HTML live preview + in-page inspector + auto-collected assets/CSS + state controls + snapshot export for publishing handoff. The pro variant of vibecode-browser-preview.

runtime.This unsaved HTML file has no folder to: This unsaved HTML file has no folder to serve from. Save it inside a folder or open a workspace folder.
runtime.No pins yet. Click an element in the pre: No pins yet. Click an element in the preview to inspect it.
runtime.Snapshots are written to .vibecode/brows: Snapshots are written to .vibecode/browser-preview/ — added to .gitignore automatically.
runtime.No changes yet — toggle a class, add inl: No changes yet — toggle a class, add inline style, change force state, or write notes.
runtime.Some hover/focus rules in external style: Some hover/focus rules in external stylesheets are not simulatable (cross-origin).
